author: Ayman Mahfuz
name: MLP3x + WD0.04 + OrthoInit + Sliding Eval
blurb: Non-record local run (RTX 3060, 1000 steps): MLP_MULT=3 widens the feedforward, decoupled weight decay 0.04 in Muon improves quantization, orthogonal init adds a small gain, and sliding-window eval with stride 64 recovers ~0.035 BPB; final int8+zlib roundtrip scores 1.4536 BPB at 14.6 MB under the 16 MB cap.
